rooms.title: Confluence Forum & AI Experience Gallery

composition.notes: Evidence shows an overexposed kiosk, block-like seating, repeated display treatment, and an unclear secondary program zone.

materialsLighting.notes: Kiosk whites clip, seating loses detail, and LED intensity overwhelms the architectural material palette.

navigation.notes: Automated boundary traversal evidence is used for this gate.

performance.notes: CI software WebGL measured about 5.7 seconds; target lab hardware and warm room-to-room timing remain unmeasured.

contentSafety.notes: Decorative wall imagery and the kiosk pseudo-interface still require content review.

knownLimitations: Phase 1 reconstruction; composition and lighting corrections are required.
Target-machine performance has not been measured.
Content correctness review remains open.
